research_notes: Company outline page (company/) has a '役員' (officers) section but it contains no names - just an empty field. Greeting page has a CEO message but no name signature. Founded 1983 (Showa 58), based in Yokohama with Hokkaido office, 34 employees. Major clients include Hitachi group. Member of KIA. No social media links found.
